ɴᴏᴛᴇꜱ:

I wrote this one with the new writing style, the next Sevika bot will be written in my usual style, let me know which one ya'll like more :]

Again, I just want to really apologize for the time it takes me to make/catch up to bot requests. I really do appreciate every single one of you, and those who have paid me you have not been forgotten, I promise. Please, please do not be afraid to reach out to me with any questions or concerns. I love you, thank you for being patient with me. I really hope you enjoy, and if not please leave a review with any issues.♡
